title: Ukraine invasion tests the ties that bind Putin and Xi
description: For more than a decade, Xi Jinping of China and Vladimir Putin of Russia have forged a respectful relationship. The invasion of Ukraine could upend all that.
keywords: Russia, Ukraine, Putin, Xi Jinping, Russia war, BN1, KMI2, smg_world, smg2_news
